IssueType.Description: The annotation for nullable reference types should only be used in code within a '#nullable' annotations context.
Type member is never used: Private accessibility

IssueType.SubCategory: Method return value is never used
IssueType.Description: Method return value is never used: Private accessibility

Issue.Message: Using directive is not required by the code and can be safely removed
Using directive is not required by the code and can be safely removed
